75157.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 27
75157.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-27-cryptobeholder-dusxf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BKqL9%2F1hKQXKVf3cpC%2Ftkug%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1N42Z-WYZ3lsk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqwl0df4~s6-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqwl0df4-s6
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Risk-off dominates as Bitcoin clings to $60K, ETFs hemorrhage $1.79B and Strategy slips below its own Bitcoin value. Yet institutions keep building — Tether, Chainlink and Securitize all pushed deeper into traditional finance. 📉 Bitcoin ETFs bleed $1.79B in second-largest weekly outflow US spot Bitcoin ETFs shed roughly $1.79 billion last week, their second-heaviest outflow since launch, as Bitcoin briefly slid near $58,000 before steadying around $60,000. BlackRock's IBIT led the exit, leaving the average holder down close to 40%. Read full story 🏦 Strategy's market value sinks below its Bitcoin stash Michael Saylor's Strategy is now worth less than the Bitcoin it holds, with its mNAV ratio dropping under 1 for the first time this cycle. The vanished premium removes the easy share-issuance engine that funded fresh BTC buys, while its STRC preferred shares trade well below par. More details 🇪🇺 Binance loses MiCA license as Coinbase and OKX court its EU users After Binance failed to secure a MiCA license covering its roughly 450 million EU users, rivals pounced. Coinbase's Brian Armstrong and OKX's Star Xu launched sign-up bonuses worth up to 8% of deposits to pull defecting traders onto their regulated platforms. Read more 🪙 Tether unlocks lending against its $23B gold pile Tether is extending its tokenized gold strategy, letting XAUT holders borrow against their bullion without selling the underlying metal. The bullion-backed loans mirror Bitcoin-backed lending and put the issuer's sizable gold reserves to work. See details 🛡️ Polymarket hack grows to $3.1M as senators demand a CFTC probe Polymarket revised its breach loss upward to $3.1 million and pledged full refunds, but the pressure intensified. Senators John Curtis and Adam Schiff urged the CFTC to investigate the platform over reportedly deceptive marketing practices. Read full story 🔗 Chainlink lands DTCC and Pangea for TradFi settlement Chainlink's Runtime Environment was selected by DTCC for collateral management and by Pangea for FX settlement, pushing blockchain deeper into core financial plumbing. The wins landed alongside two of Chainlink's strongest network-growth days of 2026. More details 🚀 Securitize heads to public markets with $400M in hand Tokenization firm Securitize expects about $400 million on its upcoming sto

75152.subject: Passage is expanding CoinList's mission
75152.body:
What the CLARITY Act means for Token Launches

( http://coinlist.co?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=banner&utm_campaign=6.25 )

🎉 *Congratulations to the Arcium team!* We're proud to have supported their journey and the community's access to ARX and are excited for <confidential>.

*🚀 Introducing Passage by CoinList:* Passage is the infrastructure powering that transition, connecting issuers, platforms, and investors through compliant distribution for tokenized assets.

📖 *Featured Blog: What the CLARITY Act Means for Token Launches*
We break down the operational impact, and what founders should be doing now to prepare.

( http://passage.coinlist.co?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=banner&utm_campaign=6.25 )

*Introducing Passage by CoinList*

For years, CoinList has helped bring groundbreaking crypto projects to market.

Now we're expanding that mission.

Passage is the infrastructure powering compliant access to the next generation of onchain capital markets, helping issuers distribute tokenized assets and enabling platforms to offer investment opportunities directly to their users.

LEARN MORE ( http://passage.coinlist.co?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=button&utm_campaign=6.25 )

*Architecture Over Ambiguity: How CLARITY Rewrites Token Offers, Distributions, and Listings*

The proposed CLARITY Act could fundamentally change how token projects approach launches, distributions, and exchange listings. Explore what the framework means for builders, why ambiguity may no longer be enough, and the practical considerations teams should be planning for today.

READ MORE ( http://blog.coinlist.co/architecture-over-ambiguity-how-clarity-rewrites-token-offers-distributions-and-listings-for-trading?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=button&utm_campaign=6.25 )

Legal Notice

The products, services, information and/or materials referenced may not be available for all individuals or residents of certain jurisdictions.

This email is being distributed by CoinList Global Services , dba “CoinList,” or one of its affiliates. This email and use of the CoinList website is subject to certain disclosures, restrictions and risks, available here ( https://coinlist.co/disclaimers ). Nothing in this presentation shall constitute or be construed as an offering of securities or as investment advice, tax advice or investment recommendations (i.e., recommendations as to whether to enter or not to enter into any transaction involving any specific interest or interests) by CoinList, or any of its affiliates or a recommendation as to an investment or other strategy.

The information in this email is subject to change without notice. CoinList makes no representations or endorsements whatsoever regarding any third-party content/sites that may be accessible directly or indirectly from this email or the CoinList website. While CoinLists takes reasonable efforts to confirm the information presented in this newsletter, it makes no representations,
